zh.lifeSummary: Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac是Ralph Murdac和Beatrice de Cheyne的女兒，出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特。她於0954年與Thurstan de Bastenburg在法國豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國瓦維其可爾卡素 利波迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac是Ralph Murdac和Beatrice de Cheyne的女儿，出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特。她于0954年与Thurstan de Bastenburg在法国豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国瓦維其可爾卡素 利波迪。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Murdac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Murdoch
meanings: Scottish: from an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal names Muireadhach ‘mariner’, Murchadh ‘sea-warrior’, and Muircheartach ‘sea-ruler’, the first element in each being muir ‘sea’. The personal name was introduced into Yorkshire and Normandy by Norsemen from Ireland as early as the 10th century. The surname in post-Conquest medieval England usually belongs to Norman families.

nameMeanings.name: Juliane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

variants.name: Julieann
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

variants.name: Julieanne
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

historicEvents.title: Vikings Invade England
historicEvents.description: Viking raiders from Scandinavia invaded England in 980. Years later in 991, the English government paid them 10,000 in hopes for peace. The Viking raiders, however, continued to force more money from England.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac was born in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Ralph Murdac and Beatrice de Cheyne. She married Thurstan de Bastenburg in 0954, in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac est née à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Ralph Murdac et Beatrice de Cheyne. Elle a épousé Thurstan de Bastenburg en 0954, à Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Juliane Beaudesert De MurdacはイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトでRalph MurdacとBeatrice de Cheyneの娘として生まれた。0954年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアモントフォート-スル-リスルでThurstan de Bastenburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスワーウィクシュアイアカストル リバートイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 Ralph Murdac(와)과 Beatrice de Cheyne의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 0954년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 몽포트-수-리슬일에서 Thurstan de Bastenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 워윅실르 카스틀 리버티에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Thurstan de Bastenburg em 0954, em Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Beldesert Castle, Warwickshire, England: Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac родилась в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Ralph Murdac и Beatrice de Cheyne. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thurstan de Bastenburg в 0954 г. в местности монтфорт-сур-рисл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности кастл либирти, варвиккшир, Англия.
